Package index

All functions

anno_annotate_position_pivots()
create an annotated file for each marker, figure, area and subarea, each file has all the sample_groups used to calculate epimutation
anno_area_granges_build()
Build a GRanges object for a given genomic area/subarea
anno_manhattan_plot_marker_per_probe()
Title anno_manhattan_plot_marker_per_probe
anno_position_pivot_to_probe()
Convert a POSITION-keyed signal pivot into a PROBE-keyed lazy frame.
anno_probe_features_get()
Retrieve probe feature annotations for a given genomic area
anno_sort_by_chr_and_start()
sort the dataframe using CHR and START sorting column first for CHR and after for START
assoc_apply_stat_model()
Title
assoc_bayes_analysis()
Bayesian posterior probability analysis of SEMseeker mutations and lesions
assoc_compute_mean_delta_permutation_cpu()
Compute mean delta permutation (CPU)
assoc_compute_quantile_delta_permutation()
Compute quantile delta permutation (CPU)
assoc_compute_quantreg_permutation()
Title
assoc_compute_spearman_permutation()
Compute Spearman permutation statistic (CPU)
assoc_exact_pvalue()
Quantile regression result value, confidence interval and p.value
assoc_glm_model()
GLM association model
assoc_inter_study_association_meta_analysis()
Cross-study meta-analysis of association results
assoc_intra_study_association_replication()
Intra-study association (focused replication across models)
assoc_mean_permutation()
Mean permutation model
assoc_mediation_linear_model()
Mediation analysis using linear models
assoc_model_performance()
Compute model performance metrics
assoc_polynomial_formula_build()
Build a polynomial regression formula with covariate interactions
assoc_quantile_permutation_model()
assoc_quantile_permutation_model calculate differences between the same quantile of two distribution
assoc_quantreg_model()
Quantile regression model (lqm)
assoc_quantreg_permutation_model()
Quantile regression permutation model
assoc_spearman_permutation()
Spearman permutation model
assoc_test_model()
Statistical test model dispatcher
assoc_volcano_plot_inference()
Volcano plot of association results for one inference_detail row.
association_analysis()
Association analysis of SEMseeker results
core_check_session_compatibility()
Check compatibility of SEMseeker sessions before meta-analysis
core_get_meth_tech()
Detect the Illumina methylation array technology from a signal matrix
core_init_env()
init ssEnvonment
cytoband_hg19
cytoband_hg19
diagnostic_performance()
Diagnostic performance (sensitivity & specificity) of SEMseeker mutations and lesions
dmr_annotation
dmr_annotation
enrich_find_unique_gene_sets()
Find gene sets unique to each group
enrich_inter_study_enrichment_compare()
Compare enrichment results across studies
enrich_intra_study_enrichment_subsamples_overlaps()
Enrichment stability across random subsamples of a study
enrich_wrap_it()
Wrap long strings to a fixed width
enrichment_analysis()
Enrichment analysis (pathway + phenotype)
io_build_data_set_from_geo()
io_build_data_set_from_geo
io_coord_probe_features()
Build a minimal probe_features data frame from synthetic probe IDs.
io_coord_to_semseeker()
Convert a coordinate-based methylation data frame to SEMseeker internal format.
io_data_preparation()
Title
io_dir_check_and_create()
Create a directory path, building any missing intermediate directories
io_dump_sample_as_bed_file()
given data and colnames dump as bed file
io_is_coord_format()
Detect whether a data frame is in coordinate format (CHR + START columns).
io_normalize_signal_input()
Transparently normalise signal input for any technology.
io_pivot_to_long_format()
Get the pivot in long format instead of wide format
io_probe_id_to_coord()
Parse synthetic probe IDs back to a CHR / START / END data frame.
metrics_properties
metrics_properties
plot_create_heatmap()
plot_create_heatmap load the multiple bed resulting from analysis organized into files and folders per marker and produce a pivot
plot_manhattan_plot_per_area()
Manhattan plot of association results per genomic area
sem_analyze_population()
Calculate stochastic epi mutations from a methylation dataset as outcome report of pivot
sem_analyze_single_sample()

sem_coverage_analysis_report()
Probe coverage analysis report

sem_manhattan_plot_marker_per_sample()
Manhattan plot of SEM markers for a single sample
sem_metrics_filter()
Filter metrics by transformation type
sem_mutations_get()

sem_signal_range_values()
calculate the range of signal values to define the outlier

semseeker()
Run SEMseeker on methylation data from any supported source
